meta.description: Vollständige NSC-Stammdaten für Punin - Erweiterte Version.

npcs.name: Sirdon Kosmaar

lore_profile.background: Geboren 972 BF. Meisterhafter Metamagier und aktuelle Spektabilität des Pentagrammatons.
lore_profile.personality: Konservativ, streng und intolerant gegenüber Fehlern.
lore_profile.secrets: Überwacht heimlich die Forschung in Kuslik.

npcs.portrait_prompt: A highly detailed, atmospheric digital painting of Sirdon Kosmaar, a stern elderly male wizard with sharp features, wearing magnificent grey traditional mage robes. Dark fantasy RPG character portrait, Das Schwarze Auge style, grand magical academy library background, dramatic lighting, epic, masterpiece, high resolution.

npcs.name: Asterion Barratos

lore_profile.background: Widmet sich der Erforschung astraler Strömungen.
lore_profile.personality: Tief in Gedanken versunken, fahrig aber freundlich.
lore_profile.secrets: Hat eine drohende astrale Erschütterung entdeckt.
lore_profile.plot_hooks: Benötigt Messungen in den versiegelten Kellern.

npcs.portrait_prompt: A highly detailed, atmospheric digital painting of Asterion Barratos, a middle-aged absent-minded male wizard massaging his neck, wearing slightly disheveled grey robes. Dark fantasy RPG character portrait, Das Schwarze Auge style, cluttered study room with glowing floating astral maps, dramatic lighting, epic, masterpiece, high resolution.

npcs.name: Nariwen saba Zulhamin

lore_profile.background: Hütet die Schätze der Grauen Wacht.

npcs.portrait_prompt: A highly detailed, atmospheric digital painting of Nariwen saba Zulhamin, a elegant Tulamydian female archivist, wearing luxurious flowing grey and gold robes. Dark fantasy RPG character portrait, Das Schwarze Auge style, ancient restricted library background, mysterious lighting, epic, masterpiece, high resolution.

npcs.name: Regolon Dachsfell

lore_profile.secrets: Nutzt heimlich Stimulanzien um dem Druck standzuhalten.

npcs.portrait_prompt: A highly detailed, atmospheric digital painting of Regolon Dachsfell, young exhausted but determined male wizard student, grey student robe. Dark fantasy RPG character portrait, Das Schwarze Auge style, stacks of books background, dramatic lighting.
